_comment: Copy this file to ~/.appi-claw/config.json and fill in your own values. All fields marked YOUR_... must be replaced.

user_profile._comment: Your personal profile — used by the AI to write tailored application drafts.
user_profile.name: YOUR_FULL_NAME
user_profile.experience: Brief description of your work/internship experience
user_profile.remote_preference: remote preferred / hybrid OK / on-site only

telegram._comment: Create a bot via @BotFather on Telegram. Get your user ID from @userinfobot.

gemini._comment: Get a free API key at https://aistudio.google.com/. gemini-2.5-flash is recommended.

google_sheets._comment: Enable Sheets API in Google Cloud, create service account, share sheet with service account email.

platforms._comment: Credentials for each platform. Leave empty if you don't use that platform.

documents._comment: resume_path: path to your PDF resume. auto_upload_resume: attach automatically. cover_letter_auto_generate: generate a cover letter for every application.

settings._comment: dry_run: fill form but don't submit (safe default). approval_timeout_minutes: wait before auto-skip. max_draft_edits: AI re-draft rounds. draft_tone: professional/casual/startup-friendly. draft_length: short/medium/long.
